task.en:
Find this Mac's display and system details and record them in Notes. Create a new note titled exactly `Display Report`. The body must contain exactly these FOUR lines, with each placeholder replaced by the real current value read from System Settings:
```
Computer Name: <name>
Time Zone: <IANA tz, e.g. America/New_York>
Display Resolution: <WIDTHxHEIGHT, e.g. 1920x1080>
macOS Build: <build, e.g. 23H..>
```
Get `Computer Name` from System Settings → General → About (or Sharing). Get `Time Zone` from System Settings → General → Date & Time (use the IANA name like `America/New_York`). Get `Display Resolution` from System Settings → Displays (the active pixel resolution, written WIDTHxHEIGHT). Get `macOS Build` from System Settings → General → About → the build number shown next to the version (e.g. tap the version). Do not add any other notes.

pre_command: UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: CN=$(scutil --get ComputerName 2>/dev/null); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Display Report"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$CN" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Computer Name: $CN" && echo True || echo False

TZ=$(systemsetup -gettimezone 2>/dev/null | awk -F': ' '{print $2}'); [ -z "$TZ" ] && TZ=$(readlink /etc/localtime | sed 's#.*/zoneinfo/##'); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Display Report"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TZ" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Time Zone: $TZ" && echo True || echo False

RES=$(system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType 2>/dev/null | awk -F': ' '/Resolution/{print $2; exit}' | grep -oE '[0-9]+ x [0-9]+' | head -1 | tr -d ' '); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Display Report"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$RES" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "Display Resolution: $RES" && echo True || echo False

BLD=$(sw_vers -buildVersion 2>/dev/null); BODY=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Display Report"' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$BLD" ] && echo "$BODY" | grep -qF "macOS Build: $BLD" && echo True || echo False
